content: checkWarrenConfig (src/diagnostics/checks.ts) emits a single 'warren_config' check that walks every registered project, parsing each .warren/ via the cache when supplied (cache?: WarrenConfigCache) or directly via load() (tests). Empty project list -> ok with 'no projects registered'. WarrenConfigUnavailableError on a project becomes a per-project failure entry rather than throwing past the check; per-file errors are aggregated as '<projectId> <file>: <message>' joined with '; '. Hint always points at /projects/:id/refresh.
